title: Apocalypse CIT
description: This is a resource pack that adds several dozen items and weapons related to the zombie apocalypse.
body:
This is a resource pack that adds several dozen vanilla-style weapons and items that can be used for zombie apocalypse scenarios. **It requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** (or a similar mod) Table of items can be found [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Iuk7XdfQ4cw7bC1-G28PtF5K9Bmgn2Cch1sm1yqqSs4/edit?usp=sharing). **FAQ:** Q: Can you update to (version)?
A: You can still use the resource pack on newer versions, it will still work.
Q: Can you add (incredibly complex thing)?
A: No.
Q: Can this be for Bedrock?
A: No.
Q: Can I use your textures/models for my own project?
A: No.
Q: Can I help with the project?
A: No.
Q: When is the next update?
A: No.
Refer to [The List™](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1BM9vZi7FYFY8XBARXMcYBKM3j-vJ9kVd1tHdiDFfPkY/edit#heading=h.nabx7qxrqr1y) before asking for an item to be added. Please don't ask me to update the pack version. This pack is also hosted on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/zombie-apocalypse-cit-resource-pack-v1-00-for-1-16-5/).
